title: [WIP]set mountopt for ubuntu
body:

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *baude* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). A friendly reminder that this PR had no activity for 30 days.
@baude can we close this one, I don't think this is still being worked on?

@baude: PR needs rebase.

<details>

Instructions for interacting with me using PR comments are available [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/pull-requests.md).  If you have questions or suggestions related to my behavior, please file an issue against the [kubernetes/test-infra](https://github.com/kubernetes/test-infra/issues/new?title=Prow%20issue:) repository.
</details>
I am taking a shot and close the PR. I assume it was opened while analyzing some CI slowness on Ubuntu which has been addressed in the meantime by @baude.
